content: Vitest 5.x beta (5.0.0-beta.4 in package.json; stable releases are v3.x and v4.x — Context7 shows v3_2_4, v4.0.7, v4.1.6 as versioned docs). Use 'vitest/globals' in tsconfig types for global APIs (describe, it, expect). Coverage via test.coverage.provider: 'v8' (fast, no install) or 'istanbul'. For strict TypeScript test files, no extra config beyond vitest.config.ts with defineConfig from 'vitest/config'. jsdom as optional peer dep for browser simulation.
